title: COVID-19 | Coronavirus Disease 2019 | MedlinePlus
content: COVID-19 (Coronavirus Disease 2019) Also called: Coronavirus, COVID-19 On this page Basics Summary Start Here Symptoms Diagnosis and Tests Prevention and Risk Factors Treatments and Therapies Learn More Related Issues Specifics See, Play and Learn No links available Research Statistics and Research Journal Articles Resources Find an Expert For You Children Women Older Adults Patient Handouts Summary COVID-19 (coronavirus disease 2019) is an illness caused by a virus. This virus is a coronavirus called SARS-CoV-2. It spreads when a person who has the infection breathes out droplets and very small particles that contain the virus. On this page, you'll find links to resources on important issues such as symptoms, risks, and how you can protect yourself and your family.
